subcodes.first_line: O thou rose that hath blossomed in the garden of God's love! With the utmost affection have I read thy letter, wondrous in its profound meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الورد المتفتح فی حدیقه محبة الله انی تلوت بکل حب تحریرک البدیع المعانی و به
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
